entity.summary: Automated-market-maker exchange on the Beam gaming network, providing token swaps and permissionless liquidity pools through the official Beam application suite.
entity.notes: HEI uses 2023-09-01 as a month-level launch marker because Beam mainnet entered public operation in September 2023 and the exchange is a native network service, but an exact standalone Beam Swap launch day was not recovered. Current first-party support documentation confirms continuing swap and liquidity-pool operation.

events.title: Beam Swap entered operation with Beam mainnet
events.description: Beam opened its native automated-market-maker exchange for token swaps and liquidity pools during the network's public mainnet rollout.
events.notes: The exact exchange launch day was not recovered; the event is normalized to the documented September 2023 Beam mainnet launch month.

evidence.title: Merit Circle's Beam subnet opens and onboards new games
evidence.notes: Contemporary coverage records the Beam mainnet launch in September 2023.

evidence.title: How to swap tokens on BeamSwap
evidence.notes: First-party guide documents the official swap interface and transaction flow.

evidence.title: Beam Swap support category
evidence.notes: Current first-party support section covers swaps, token lists, fees, liquidity, wallets, and troubleshooting.

evidence.title: BeamSwap fees
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes AMM gas costs and the liquidity-provider fee model.

evidence.title: Beam Swap application
evidence.notes: The official exchange interface remains reachable.
